issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, focusing only on happy path usage.

scenarios.name: 3d-card-tilt
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric, while Response B omits all required components and logic.

scenarios.name: spotlight-follow-cursor
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items but omits the SpotlightCard example, while Response B lacks key hooks, motion, Tailwind, and the required example.

scenarios.name: wavy-animated-background
scenarios.rationale: Response B includes some prop usage and hints at a component, while Response A only provides a CSS-based solution with no canvas or animation logic.
